Gwesgylliel is at Lin Giliath in Meluinen, in the North Downs. Gwesgylliel is waiting for you to return with the second set of components she needs.
Gwesgylliel is at Lin Giliath in Meluinen, in the North Downs. Gwesgylliel is waiting for you to return with the last set of components she needs.
